title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 05 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 05 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 05 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/08/2025
After opening, DCE iron ore futures first fell and then rose. The most-traded contract I2509 eventually closed at 790.5, with a daily increaseof 0.76%. Traders were enthusiastic about selling, while steel mills adopted a wait-and-see attitude, with weak purchase willingness.
